_comment: Static nutritional overrides for HealthKart products where __NEXT_DATA__ hghAttr is incomplete. Extracted one-time from product page nutritional label images. Only update when a product is reformulated or a new product is added.

mb-biz-1kg-lcicc.source: Nutritional label image on product page

tb-wpi-c-1kg-choc.source: Nutritional label image on product page

tb-wpi-1kg-vanilla.source: Nutritional label image on product page (Vanilla)

tb-raw-conc-1kg-unflav.source: Nutritional label: 28g protein per 35g serving. HealthKart reports 229% which is a data error.

bg-plant-1kg-choc.source: bgreen.in product page: 22g plant protein per scoop (36g serving)

own-iso-500g-cocoa.source: Product page: 24g of protein from a 31g scoop

own-plant-1kg-coffee.source: Product page: use the 33g scoop, 24g protein per serving

own-wpc-1kg-cocoa.source: Product page: 24g protein per scoop, same scoop as plant protein

own-wpc-1kg-coffee.source: Product page: 24g protein per scoop, same scoop as plant protein

plix-yeast-1kg-choc.source: Plix packaging label: 26g protein per 37g scoop

plix-evolve-1kg-vanilla.source: Plix packaging label: 25g protein per 33g scoop

plix-strength-1kg-banana.source: Plix packaging label: 25g protein per 33g scoop
